action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline ResNet50+LSTM (no attention) after 3 epochs has train loss down to ~2.6 but val/test exprate=0.0 (le1=0.0017, le2=0.025). Training took ~33s. Model saved but not useful yet. Analysis: Global pooled features + simple LSTM likely insufficient for 2D math structure (common for this task); exact match rate stays 0 until model learns sequence well. Generation or data pipeline may have subtle issues (e.g. tokenization, early EOS). Decision: Add debug.py to inspect GT vs. model predictions on val samples (what is it outputting? empty? repetitive?). Then iterate on model (add spatial features + attention) or train longer (20+ epochs, scheduler) while measuring time. Will submit_eval after improvements.
